text: So here’s the thing - 2 thoughts that have been “burning” a hole in my brain - am I not gonna text Maddie today? I don’t want to and I think that’s making it hard. I would maybe want to hang out with her but I don’t want to have sex and I don’t know how to tell her that…yeah a bit confusing…

Also, I keep thinking about how Stanley said people in the midwest know to wear long dark pants and long sleeves and wide-brimmed hats and I keep imagining all these (faceless) people wearing that outfit, but looking just so cool. I guess the weird part is that they still somehow stay cool in the summer - maybe they are constantly putting ice cubes down their shirt, or maybe their cool countenance is what keeps them cool. Also, I was trying to photoshop any pieces of dust on the image but they were getting confused with the dust on my screen. IDK what pattern that is,

Yesterday went to Markis house and drank wine and played Cards Against Humanity and it was actually kind of fun even though I thought I hated Markis. Then Niha and I talked about Zach being sneaky and dating a bunch of people and Sean and I got in a fight cause he - idk - didn’t think it was a big deal/was mad about me having a crush on Zach and couldn’t tell and got mad when I thought he was mad - should ask him why that would make him mad if he wasn’t mad to begin with.

Whatever - this is where the trouble starts, and then it ends. I dont have to deal with his emotions nor Jonathans when he was getting mad in the music room - I am responsible for my emotions only and I don’t ask for help in controlling myself - and no one should be able to ask me for help either - not Niha who needs help getting over her ex - not idk…I want to stop a relationship before it gets emotionally dependent - I want to keep my sanctity. I know I should wait for Sean to calm down - we’re hanging too much - I get that.  But I want to. Idk why - he feels like home?

Anyway - at M’s house - lol - Juliet is the most insane person ever - it was like a comedy “let’s play uno!” “uno uno uno” - two sketches now - the one about the hot girl walk - and now the one about ther person who really wants to play uno - we kept trying to play truth or dare - M made her read card: “what was your first impression” and she didn’t like it - then we made a rule - when you run out of cards - oh, the other are and David got it Sean asked “what was your first impression of Juliet” and she would not let him answer - kept saying “oh - I know you thought I was crazy” But he wouldn’t (I) wouldn’t).

Let the game continue until David had answered. And David, as we know is very slow to think and straight-faced so he was just thinking and she kept trying to keep the game going - saying “who’s turn is it?” And I would say “oh no, David needs to think” and Nestor would say “give him time to think” eventually he said she was nice cause she bought him drinks - whiskey shots.

Update: M texted to say they feel sad and can’t decide if they want to hang out which is exactly how I feel - so they are perfect. Yesterday I hung with Evan almost all day. It was nice - I’m always down to hang with Evan and I always almost want to kiss him, but don’t actually - that’s kinda how I feel about everyone - Sean - Zach, Jonathan. We stayed at the same greek restaurant forever - and met at coffee connection, and went to Oaxacan place n’ shared a vegan mole enchilada and pretty much agreed on exactly what to order (neither of us wanted veggies) lol - he high-fived me when I said I was gaining weight.

he helped me message this girl Nicole about vidya games. We went to Yum Yum so I could push his teeth. Be brought Asoka. I like to have a friend crush on him but also don’t want to date him. He had a breakup brunch with Sia who I’d never heard about (play partner?) He said Silverlake is iffy cause he doesn’t like driving. Idk  I almost never believe him. Sean said it was gay that he said “Sarah loves hard” - so gay he wants to fuck him. Sean and I just get each other and it’s annoying cause we can’t be together and he gets angry. He would be a perfect friend. I do actually like sex with him , but he’s a lil’ too intense, like when I look in his eyes it feels like he’s crazy/maybe not all there…I had some nice dreams.

(pic: guy w sweet in his brain) oh, and now it is in the brain.

Hey Evsie - can I do a powerpoint for you? We can go to Taverna? Idk why maybe see our sweetheart?

Should I drink more chai tea → text Maddie → they want to hangout → they don’t want to hangout → I drink more chai tea :) lol
→ maddie wants to hangout → i drink more chai tea
→ maddie doesn’t want to hangout → i drink more chai tea
Just because they’re the same doesn’t mean it can’t fit into that structure

SHOWER THOUGHTS
- the “imaginary category” - the logical extension - that actually exists in some cases
Replacing Things with Themselves
Collecting Friends: the game where you collect friends
there “should” be an explanation here, but instead it’s just the same thing again. To answer the question: ‘oh - what’s the game about - oh - my question is answered, but I don’t have any new information (and I still don’t know what the game is about)
ex 2. inventing new punctuation: because we need new punctuation (the punctuation in question: I want more strawberries/raspberries - (when you can’t decide between 2 options, or they both work.
And so: back to the logical extension thing:

Maddie is in one category. Sean understands my jokes and thinks they’re funny. I make jokes, understand my jokes and think they’re funny. Jonathan doesn’t understand my jokes (or think they’re funny) the two edge cases (or it could be in quadrant) Chris doesn’t understand my jokes but does make them. Maddie understands them but doesn’t (?) think they’re funny (or at least doesn’t make them herself.) I didn’t think either of these were (would be) possible until I met these people…(maddie and chris) (pic: real imaginary imaginary real real imaginary) these two quadrants only make sense in the context they wouldn’t exist without the diagram. But now that they do, we have the fun job of filling them, whether it makes sense or not (thinking of what to fill them with)

BAD LOGIC → a pun, just like failed experiment (Becky) → logic that is bad and trying to make bad logic sorry: doing logic wrong - doing logic right - but making a new kind of logic…idk…trying…anyway. (pic) ← imagine that these look exactly the same, and aren’t so abstracted…* *also, as an example of a weird way to abstract a horse :)

→ comparing a horse to a horse → what do two horses have in common? this feels like the setup to a joke, but it is, in fact, an assignment asking you to imagine about what two horses (that are exactly the same) might have in common. (I might get this is a tattoo). This is an example of bad logic (because) you can’t compare something to the exact same thing, to itself, (pic: empty venn diagram) etc. etc. A whole page of venn diagrams as an assignment (?) - just start comparing things - thinking about what things have in common @@PB@@ SHOWER THOUGHTS END HERE

OTHER THOUGHTS (treadmill thoughts)
pop-up book where the exercises are things like: SET THEORY, MOLD THEORY, PAIRINGS, WHAT’S THE PROCEDURE
Filling the memory library with coin envelopes with pictures stickered on, and the examples of the event inside

The lesson I keep writing in my mind everytime I get in bed 
1.5 hours to teach
AMBIGUOUS EVENTS
THEORY OF MIND
COMPETING PATTERNS
PEOPLE AS PARADOXES
CONNECTING ACTIONS TO INTENTIONS

THE SECOND LESSON: ABSTRACTION the model no longer works, and in this case, is the opposite or even a perverted version It seems sacrilegious to combine semantics and (meaning) in this way - (the soldier with a platform for feet - not to mention a little bit grotesque to imagine someone being born with a wide flat plane of skin (?) beneath their feet - the challenges they come) face - walking etc.

I don’t necessarily even need to imagine everything new - all you need to do is create a structure, and place something inside, and imagine the missing events. (like we created the elements on the periodic table, but they are unstable) iMind - the same function - how does our mind decide what to keep /vs. discard. Can we use this to our advantage - 1. putting a fork (looks like it) in the road - a pin in it - got enough (?) on the fabric, like a drawer handle - how to dave memories, and how to retrieve memories we (?) put it in a place you know you’re (?) to look - big brain - setting up a place you know you’re gonna look - purposely losing your (?) AM I HUNGRY? ← a pattern I’m always looking for (this is a pun)
